sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, DATE '2023-03-15');
SELECT id, month(event_date) AS event_month FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = DATE '2023-02-20' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, month(event_date) AS new_event_month FROM test_dates;
